Text: We need to reflect Model with Potential Unfairness XOR branch with CulturalFitCheck then CommunityAffiliationCheck giving advantage and Model Without Unfairness no XOR branch all go through same CulturalFitCheck

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Assume start node ReceiveApplication

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then DataCompletenessCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If incomplete loop to RequestMoreInfo then back to DataCompletenessCheck The description loop for data completeness and request more info

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simplify after ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck to if missing RequestMoreInfo to back to DataCompletenessCheck Once complete proceed to SkillAssessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After SkillAssessment threshold leads to either proceed or disqualify but we can just continue to CulturalFitCheck for those who pass

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For model with unfairness after CulturalFitCheck XOR one branch to CommunityAffiliationCheck giving advantage then continue to ManagerialReview other branch to CulturalFitCheck no advantage then continue to ManagerialReview Then both converge to ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model without unfairness after CulturalFitCheck all go to ManagerialReview no XOR Then FinalDecision

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: Lets define node IDs n1 ReceiveApplication n2 DataCompletenessCheck n3 RequestMoreInfo n4 SkillAssessment n5 CulturalFitCheck n6 CommunityAffiliationCheck n7 ManagerialReview n8 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now construct edges transitions based on flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 with unfairness Flow ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: DataCompletenessCheck to if missing RequestMoreInfo to DataCompletenessCheck loop back So we have edges ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck DataCompletenessCheck to RequestMoreInfo when missing RequestMoreInfo to DataCompletenessCheck loop DataCompletenessCheck to SkillAssessment when complete

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck pass

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: CulturalFitCheck to XOR two branches Branch A CulturalFitCheck to CommunityAffiliationCheck advantage Branch B continue to ManagerialReview directly

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Actually after CommunityAffiliationCheck to ManagerialReview advantage path and the no advantage path also goes to ManagerialReview directly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 without unfairness Same start to SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck all Then CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview no branch Then ManagerialReview to FinalDecision
